summary: OCB TITAN ERP - Batch 3 Testing: AR Payment Dropdown Fix & Accounting Module Toolbar Implementation. All tests PASSED. 1) ARPaymentAdd dropdown correctly shows Kas, Kas Kecil, Bank BCA accounts from /api/accounting/accounts endpoint. 2) CashTransactions, JournalEntries, ChartOfAccounts all have ERPActionToolbar with standard buttons. 3) Regression tests for PurchaseList and SalesOrderList PASSED.

issues: Route mismatch: docs say /accounting/cash but actual route is /accounting/cash-in (should be documented)

AR_PAYMENT_DROPDOWN_FIX.description: Critical fix verified - Account dropdown now shows Kas/Bank accounts
AR_PAYMENT_DROPDOWN_FIX.endpoint_status: 200 OK - Returns 6 accounts including Kas, Kas Kecil, Bank BCA
AR_PAYMENT_DROPDOWN_FIX.result: PASS - All 3 required accounts visible in dropdown

CASH_TRANSACTIONS_TOOLBAR.row_selection: PASS - Edit disabled initially, enabled after row click
CASH_TRANSACTIONS_TOOLBAR.selection_indicator: PASS - Shows '1 item dipilih: ID: CASH-AUDIT-001'

CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_TOOLBAR.row_selection: PASS - Edit enabled after row selection

critical_code_review_comments: Note: CashTransactions route is /accounting/cash-in not /accounting/cash as mentioned in requirements

success_rate.backend: 100% - API endpoint /api/accounting/accounts returns all required accounts
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 4 modules (ARPayment, CashTransactions, JournalEntries, ChartOfAccounts) pass tests

context_for_next_testing_agent:
Batch 3 testing completed successfully:

1. AR PAYMENT DROPDOWN FIX - VERIFIED:
   - Endpoint /api/accounting/accounts?category=asset returns 6 accounts
   - Dropdown shows: 1-1000 - Kas, 1-1001 - Kas Kecil, 1-1002 - Bank BCA
   - All 3 required accounts are present and selectable

2. ACCOUNTING MODULE TOOLBARS:
   - CashTransactions (/accounting/cash-in): ERPActionToolbar with Tambah Transaksi, Edit, Hapus, Print
   - JournalEntries (/accounting/journals): ERPActionToolbar with Tambah Jurnal, Edit, Hapus, Print
   - ChartOfAccounts (/accounting/coa): ERPActionToolbar with Tambah Akun, Edit, Hapus, Print
   - All buttons follow ERP standard colors (green/purple/red/blue)
   - Row selection properly enables/disables action buttons

3. REGRESSION TESTS PASSED:
   - PurchaseList (/purchase/list): ERPActionToolbar works correctly
   - SalesOrderList (/sales/orders): ERPActionToolbar works correctly

Note: CashTransactions uses routes /accounting/cash-in, /accounting/cash-out, /accounting/cash-transfer (not /accounting/cash)

/api/accounting/accounts?category=asset.returns: 6 accounts including Kas, Kas Kecil, Bank BCA
